MCQs: What is the main goal of supervised learning in machine learning?
Choices: a -> To find patterns in unlabeled data || b -> To learn through trial and error || c -> To predict or classify new, unseen labeled data || d -> To generate its own labels from data

MCQs: Which of the following algorithms is typically used for classification when the output is a yes/no type answer?
Choices: a -> Linear Regression || b -> Logistic Regression || c -> K-Means Clustering || d -> Random Forest Regression

MCQs: What does semi-supervised learning combine in its approach?
Choices: a -> Only labeled data || b -> Only unlabeled data || c -> A small amount of labeled data with a large amount of unlabeled data || d -> Labels generated by the model itself
